summary: Kolkwitzia amabilis / k ɒ l ˈ k w ɪ t s i ə ə ˈ m æ b ɪ l ɪ s /, commonly known as beauty bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It is the sole species in genus Kolkwitzia. It is a deciduous shrub grown as an ornamental plant. In China, where it originated, the plant is called wèi shí shu (蝟实).
